name: @acuity/auth-ui-dev-harness
description: Development and e2e harness for @acuity/auth-ui: a minimal consuming Next.js app mounting the doctor and operator journey presets. Start with `pnpm --filter @acuity/auth-ui dev` (port 3006). Kept as a sibling package so the workspace link to @acuity/auth-ui never nests inside the package it targets (a nested link forms a symlink cycle that hangs the dev server's source scanner).
